name: Ginger Pineapple Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 20-oz. can crushed pineapple in its own juice
Grated peel of 1 lemon (I used more)
3 tablespoons cornstarch mixed with 3 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Cook over moderate heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens.
3. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before pouring it into a crust.
(Note: To enhance the presentation, you may garnish sliced bananas glazed with heated, strained apricot preserves if serving this as a pie.)
